subject: Streamlining owner and renter inquiries
body:
Hi,

I came across PMI Main Street Management's website and noticed your contact form asks whether someone is an owner or renter. Smart move for routing.

We can take that a step further by automatically routing inquiries to the right team member, sending tailored auto-responses, and tracking every interaction in one place. No more sorting through emails manually.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
